branch.branch_summary: After v6.3.0, define v6.4 as a Pre-Implementation Quality Gate and QIF-Governed Explanation release before opening implementation work.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.3 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.3.0 as the AI Command Help Surface baseline and shape v6.4 around pre-implementation quality gates, negative acceptance, corrected assumptions, and QIF-governed explanations.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: After v6.3.0, define v6.4 as a Pre-Implementation Quality Gate and QIF-Governed Explanation release before opening implementation work.
